docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,015.00 FILED BY ABRAMSON, LEE EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON RICHARD DBA INDEPENDENT CONSULTING NETWORK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABRAMSON, LEE EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONDON RICHARD DBA INDEPENDENT CONSULTING NETWORK $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,015.00, ORDER OF EXAMINATION TO BE SCHEDULED ON 3/21/94 JUDGMENT IN ORANGE COUNTY MUNI CT. DATED 8/2/93. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
